subcodes.first_line: The servants and maidservants of the earth have been brought forth from nothingness into being, after recognition of His sacred Essence, for the service of His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عباد و اماء ارض از برای خدمت امر بعد از عرفان ذات مقدس از عدم بوجود آمده اند
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution
